---
title: "The Maid of Florence, or, Niccolò de Lapi, tr. W. Felgate"
---

## The Maid of Florence, or, Niccolò de Lapi, tr. W. Felgate

**Author:** Massimo D'Azeglio
**Date:** 1853
**Imprint:** London: Bentley

### Notes

The novel was first published in Italian in 1841.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
